name: Implement stories (bulk)
description: Runs a Cursor CLI agent (auto mode, composer-2.5) on each story id from board column bulk selection.
content: {"id":"implement-stories-bulk","name":"Implement stories (bulk)","runtime_inputs":[{"input_type":"string_array","key":"story_ids","label":"Story ids","required":true}],"spoke_root":"/home/fang/code/s_e_e_project/s_e_e_project","tasks":[{"function":{"input":{"collection_runtime_key":"story_ids","item_runtime_key":"story_id"},"name":"foreach"},"id":"for_each_story","name":"For each story","next_tasks":[{"function":{"input":{"command_id":"cursor-agent","config":{"cursor_model":"composer-2.5"},"prompt":"{{prompt.system-implement-story}}"},"name":"command"},"id":"implement_story","name":"Implement story (Cursor CLI, composer-2.5, auto mode)","next_tasks":[{"function":{"input":{"args":["implement-story finished for {{runtime.story_id}}; verify status: Done in the story file."],"command":"echo"},"name":"cli_command"},"id":"report_done","name":"Report completion","next_tasks":[]}]}]}]}
